name: s2-boundary-scanner
description: S2-SWM Dynamic Boundary Scanner. Processes mmWave radar data into Ego-Centric 9-Grid boundary topologies. Calculates spatial intrusion percentages and infers physical materials based on Radar Cross Section (RCS) to provide immediate collision context for Embodied AI.

MMWAVE_COM_PORT.description: Optional: Hardware serial port for real mmWave radar (e.g., /dev/ttyUSB0). Uses physics simulation if left blank.

author: Space2.world (Miles Xiang)
